generated_exposure.exposure_text: Did you know? Our reliance on foreign tech for critical infrastructure creates a dangerous bottleneck. Just last year, a minor supply chain disruption in microchips caused delays in our emergency response systems. We can't afford to gamble with our security. It's time to invest in homegrown solutions and ensure we're never held hostage by foreign interests again. #StrategicAutonomy #NationalSecurity
